entities.name: Customer uncertainty
entities.context: Prospective customers often lack precise forecasts of JD volume or seat usage when approaching sales conversations

entities.name: Pricing structure robustness
entities.context: Pricing must handle fuzziness in customer inputs while still protecting margins

entities.name: Margin protection
entities.context: Business requirement that pricing structures must preserve despite customer input uncertainty

entities.name: JD volume
entities.context: Metric customers cannot precisely forecast - represents job description throughput

entities.name: Seat-based pricing
entities.context: Pricing model where customers want to control the number of seats/users

relationships.context: Pricing must be robust to handle uncertainty and fuzziness in customer inputs
Robustness requirement exists specifically to protect margins despite fuzzy inputs
Customers cannot forecast JD volume precisely - a key source of uncertainty
Customers express need to keep seat counts controlled but cannot predict usage
